nasb.text: “For Aaron’s sons you shall make tunics; you shall also make sashes for them, and you shall make caps for them, for glory and for beauty.

esv.text: “For Aaron’s sons you shall make coats and sashes and caps. You shall make them for glory and beauty.

cnv.text: “你也要為亞倫的兒子做內袍，為他們做腰帶，又為他們做頭巾，使他們有榮耀，有華美。

ccb.text: 也要为亚伦的儿子们缝制内袍、腰带、帽子，显出他们职位的荣耀和尊贵。
